publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-04-22 18:26:46 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, minutes, reports, reviews, financial documents.
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, minutes, reports and subject files pertaining to Fawcett's tenure as Director of the Statutory Finance and Business Office and Assistant to the President and SUNY affairs.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Special Assistant to the Provost for State-Related Issues, formally the Assistant to the President (beginning in 1987), and Director of the Statutory Finance and Business Office (beginning in 1983).

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, minutes, reports and subject files pertaining to Fawcett's tenure as Director of the Statutory Finance and Business Office and Assistant to the President and SUNY Affairs.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Nathan Fawcett papers, #4-12-3183. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Federal aid to higher education.
controlaccess.corpname: University of the State of New York
Cornell University. Assistant to the President
Cornell University. Statutory Finance and Business Office

did.unittitle: Equipment Inventory Control Tag - old correspondence
Mann Library Loading Dock Relocation (file never came)
Mann Library - old back up material
Policies & Procedures - General on Steering Group
Statutory Faculty Salaries - Misc. Correspondence & Reports
State Dept. of Social Services Correspondence & Contracts
State Health Dept. - Breast Research Correspondence
Statutory Deans - cost impact meeting back-up
SUNY Report: "On Working Group on Campus Customers of SUNY System"
Vet Medicine/Facilities Misc., incl. Schurm Hall, environmental health issues
